title: SuiMekPBR
description: Pixel-style industrial PBR resource pack for Mekanism.
body:
SuiMekPBR 是一个为通用机械（Mekanism）制作的像素工业风 PBR 材质包。

本材质包主体为免费内容，主要为通用机械相关方块添加了法线贴图与粗糙度贴图，部分方块额外加入了视差贴图，使其在支持 PBR 的光影环境下拥有更立体的表现，同时仍保留 Minecraft 原有的像素颗粒感，而非平滑写实风格。

当前主体包中所有已包含的方块均已完成法线与粗糙度制作，后续会逐步为适合的方块补充视差与金属度更新。

除免费主体包外，还提供多个附属包，这些附属内容将作为独立扩展发布。

目前附属内容仍在制作中，其中通用机械发电机附属已全部完成，包含完整的法线、视差、粗糙度与金属度贴图。

本材质包仅修改视觉表现，不包含任何作弊或游戏机制相关内容。

使用前请确认：
已启用支持 PBR 的光影或渲染器
已正确加载资源包
本材质包为客户端资源包，不需要安装在服务器端

作者：小徐XuTrain
主体包永久免费，附属内容为可选扩展项目。

———

English Description

SuiMekPBR is a pixel-style industrial PBR resource pack made for Mekanism.

The main pack is completely free.
It adds normal maps and roughness maps to Mekanism-related blocks, and some blocks also include parallax mapping for better depth when using PBR-compatible shaders, while still keeping Minecraft’s original pixelated look instead of smooth realism.

All blocks included in the main pack currently have normal and roughness maps.
Parallax and metallic maps will be gradually added to suitable blocks in future updates.

In addition to the free main pack, multiple expansion packs are provided as separate add-ons.

Expansion content is still under development.
The Mekanism Generator expansion is already completed, with full normal, parallax, roughness, and metallic maps applied to all included blocks.

This resource pack only changes visuals and does not affect gameplay or provide any cheating features.

Before use:
Enable a PBR-compatible shader or renderer
Make sure the resource pack is loaded correctly
This is a client-side resource pack and does not need to be installed on servers

Author: XuTrain
Main pack is free. Expansions are optional add-ons.
